data.content: Plan review approved. The plan to add shell completions via clap_complete is feasible and well-structured: (1) add clap_complete workspace dep, (2) new completions.rs command module with --shell ValueEnum flag, (3) wire into Commands enum in main.rs, (4) add to mod.rs, (5) basic tests for each shell type, (6) update help/README if relevant. Codebase uses Clap 4 derive which has first-class clap_complete support. No architectural concerns.
